hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC and KYB providers into a unified onboarding system that preserves audit trails while enabling risk-based reviews and regulatory update alignment.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk

problem_title: Onboarding slows when compliance remains disconnected
problem_description: Corporate onboarding processes often rely on multiple disconnected tools and manual workflows, creating gaps in risk visibility and inconsistent decisions. This fragmentation leads to longer review times, duplicated checks and weak audit trails that complicate compliance control for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYC and KYB provider results, risk signals, regulatory updates and reviewer actions into one operational workflow that streamlines corporate onboarding with clear audit trails and consistent decisions.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to approval decisions
workflow_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider results with risk-based review, case workflows, decision logging and evidence to support compliant onboarding approvals.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond onboarding checks. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC, KYB, sanctions, screening and regulatory outputs into structured corporate onboarding workflows with audit-ready decisions and evidence for clearer compliance control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams with controlled orchestration, evidence preservation and deployment standards needed for audit-ready onboarding and bank due diligence workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for corporate onboarding?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance layer that connects KYC, KYB, UBO, sanctions and screening outputs into structured corporate onboarding workflows for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure onboarding workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures onboarding by orchestrating provider checks, applying internal policies, routing risk-based reviews and recording decisions in a connected, auditable workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding audit trails?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence to support full audit readiness for onboarding and beneficial ownership reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects and manages multiple KYC, KYB and screening providers without replacing them, consolidating their outputs into one compliance workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current onboarding providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing onboarding providers and turns their outputs into structured, rule-driven workflows and audit-ready evidence.
final_title: Structure corporate onboarding into controlled workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into risk-based onboarding cases and audit-ready evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
